name: Little Pecan Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the cream cheese and butter. Gradually add flour until a dough forms.
2. Roll out the dough to form 48 balls.
3. Place in small cupcake pans or mini tart pans and shape into tarts, pressing dough over the bottom and up the sides.
4. In a bowl, beat eggs lightly with a fork. Add sugar, melted butter, vanilla, and pinch of salt. Stir until combined.
5. Add chopped pecans to the egg mixture.
6. Fill each tart shell about 3/4 full (or slightly more) with the filling.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
8. Remove from oven and allow to cool.
